root.description: The ID of an AWS-managed customer master key (CMK) for Amazon SNS or a custom CMK
root.name: kms_master_key_id

root.description: The name of the SNS topic to create
root.name: name

root.description: Boolean indicating whether or not to enable content-based deduplication for FIFO topics
root.name: content_based_deduplication

root.description: Boolean indicating whether or not to create a FIFO (first-in-first-out) topic
root.name: fifo_topic

root.description: Map of IAM role ARNs and sample rate for success and failure feedback
root.name: firehose_feedback

root.description: List of IAM policy documents that are merged together into the exported document. Statements must have unique `sid`s
root.name: source_topic_policy_documents

root.description: List of IAM policy documents that are merged together into the exported document. In merging, statements with non-blank `sid`s will override statements with the same `sid`
root.name: override_topic_policy_documents

root.description: A map of IAM policy [statements](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/data-sources/iam_policy_document#statement) for custom permission usage
root.name: topic_policy_statements

root.description: Region where the resource(s) will be managed. Defaults to the Region set in the provider configuration
root.name: region

root.description: A map of tags to add to all resources
root.name: tags

root.description: The SNS delivery policy
root.name: delivery_policy

root.description: Enables higher throughput for FIFO topics by adjusting the scope of deduplication. This attribute has two possible values, Topic and MessageGroup
root.name: fifo_throughput_scope

root.description: Map of IAM role ARNs and sample rate for success and failure feedback
root.name: lambda_feedback

root.description: If SignatureVersion should be `1` (`SHA1`) or `2` (`SHA256`). The signature version corresponds to the hashing algorithm used while creating the signature of the notifications, subscription confirmations, or unsubscribe confirmation messages sent by Amazon SNS
root.name: signature_version

root.description: Determines whether an SNS topic policy is created
root.name: create_topic_policy

root.description: Specifies whether to enable the default topic policy. Defaults to `true`
root.name: enable_default_topic_policy

root.description: Map of IAM role ARNs and sample rate for success and failure feedback
root.name: http_feedback

root.description: Determines whether resources will be created (affects all resources)
root.name: create

root.description: Determines whether `name` is used as a prefix
root.name: use_name_prefix

root.description: Map of IAM role ARNs and sample rate for success and failure feedback
root.name: application_feedback

root.description: The display name for the SNS topic
root.name: display_name

root.description: Map of IAM role ARNs and sample rate for success and failure feedback
root.name: sqs_feedback

root.description: A map of subscription definitions to create
root.name: subscriptions
root.type:
map(object({
    confirmation_timeout_in_minutes = optional(number)
    delivery_policy                 = optional(string)
    endpoint                        = string
    endpoint_auto_confirms          = optional(bool)
    filter_policy                   = optional(string)
    filter_policy_scope             = optional(string)
    protocol                        = string
    raw_message_delivery            = optional(bool)
    redrive_policy                  = optional(string)
    replay_policy                   = optional(string)
    subscription_role_arn           = optional(string)
  }))

root.description: An externally created fully-formed AWS policy as JSON
root.name: topic_policy

root.description: Tracing mode of an Amazon SNS topic. Valid values: `PassThrough`, `Active`
root.name: tracing_config

root.description: The message archive policy for FIFO topics
root.name: archive_policy

root.description: Determines whether an SNS subscription is created
root.name: create_subscription

root.description: A map of data protection policy statements
root.name: data_protection_policy

root.description: The ARN of the SNS topic
root.name: topic_id

root.description: The name of the topic
root.name: topic_name

root.description: The AWS Account ID of the SNS topic owner
root.name: topic_owner

root.description: The oldest timestamp at which a FIFO topic subscriber can start a replay
root.name: topic_beginning_archive_time

root.description: Map of subscriptions created and their attributes
root.name: subscriptions

root.description: The ARN of the SNS topic, as a more obvious property (clone of id)
root.name: topic_arn
